content:
nice project, looking good overall. tbh i'd like to give some contribution if i have a free time. sadly i have personal project rn. but here's some of my comments as a developer after taking a quick look:
- separate the code to several files, this would help future contributor understand the project better.
- team builder seems having an ui issue in my device (refer to image 1)
- the url builder for team builder is not really a good practice in general programming. it just exposing raw data. tho i can kinda understand because it's a static web page.

my suggestion:
- for team builder, i recommend a method to save the team into a database using an unique identifier. then the url builder can just expose the unique identifier (if u wanna share ur team and stuff like that)
